headline: T1 Energy: Short-Term Opportunity - But Long-Term Uncertainty?
summary: T1 Energy (TE) is positioned as a US-based solar panel manufacturer targeting surging demand from AI-driven data centers.

headline: First Solar Inc (NASDAQ:FSLR): A Decent Value Play With Strong Fundamentals
summary: First Solar (FSLR) scores as a decent value stock with a P/E of 16, strong profitability, and solid growth. It appears undervalued relative to its industry peers and offers a margin of safety for patient investors.
